title: Possibility to see sub-items in Gantt view

posts.author: PaulJardel (JARDEL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !

We are using the new Gantt feature and it is really usefull for project management.

However, we use a lot of subitems. When in the Gantt view the only way to see a subitem is to go back to the original table view.

This makes the Gantt view way less usable unfortunately…

thanks for your feedbacks.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

Add your vote to this similar previous discussion too

Subitems on Gantt View and FF/FS Dependencies Feature requests
Hi! First of all, the gantt view it’s a huge and great feature! But… will be great if the subitems could appear as child tasks of the items. Also, please add top the roadmap different types of dependencies, with the new Gantt view this feature will be a must have for all planners and project managers. Regards

posts.author: MabRoj (Mabel Rojas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JohnW @PaulJardel

My name is Mabel, I am in the product team of Adaptavist, a software development company and a partner of Monday. Great to meet you, albeit virtually!

We’re conducting interviews to increase our understanding of your pain points and needs seeing Subitems in Gantt view. As active users of Monday, your experience is invaluable to us, and your feedback can help us shape a solution for you

Would you be up for a 30-min chat over Zoom? In exchange, you’ll receive a $50 gift card as a thank-you for participating.

Please click here to schedule our chat : We'd love to hear everything about your needs of subitems in Gantt view | User Interviews

Or you can reach me out here or at mhernandez@adaptavist.com. Thank you!

posts.author: sorigami (Cory Woods)
posts.cookedHtml: I am up for it if this hasn’t been added yet.

posts.author: Adamr_Heavy (Adam Rahmani)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? I feel like this is a basic feature of all gantt view features in other software.

posts.author: antoniorodriguez (Antonio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not being able to see subitems on the Gantt view is… useless.

I’ve been 20 minutes on Monday after my (huge) organization announced it’s switching to Monday from Smartsheet and others, and I keep finding huge basic gaps like this one (and I didn’t even use other tools like Smartsheet, so it’s not like I’m going for niche things…).

posts.author: Rmorante (Renzo Morante)
posts.cookedHtml: Why is it taking already 4 years to fix something a bit basic. Lots of projects are performed in phases, with items and subitems. Having subitems makes everything look so much organized and professional. We need this feature !

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: Do have this yet? I feel we can see them but its so annoying because if we use the ‘‘name’’ to label them it takes the subitem name + item name so its super long and not readable

posts.author: GanttGo (Hidai Bar-Mor)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @Izobelle @Rmorante @PaulJardel ,

If you’re still running into this, check out GanttGo on the marketplace — its a board view app that display the sub items inside the Gantt chart, nested under their parents with full hierarchy. Hope it helps!
